hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|md)$ ]]; then cd /Users/smartcow/Desktop/dev/deep-quest/web && pnpm prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /Users/smartcow/Desktop/dev/deep-quest/web && pnpm eslint "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi
